dialogues.they_es: El dolor es un diez de diez.
dialogues.they_en: The pain is a ten out of ten.
dialogues.you_en: Where exactly does it hurt most?

dialogues.they_es: He tomado ibuprofeno pero no funciona.
dialogues.they_en: I took ibuprofen but it doesn't work.
dialogues.you_en: How much ibuprofen did you take and when?

dialogues.they_es: ¿Puedo tomar algo más fuerte para el dolor?
dialogues.they_en: Can I take something stronger for the pain?
dialogues.you_en: I'm going to examine you first.
What symptoms did you have with morphine?

dialogues.they_es: El dolor empeora cuando me muevo.
dialogues.they_en: The pain gets worse when I move.
dialogues.you_es: Intente no mover esa parte ahora.
dialogues.you_en: Try not to move that area right now.

dialogues.they_en: Will I need surgery for this?
dialogues.you_en: First we need to rule out other causes.

dialogues.they_es: He estado usando opioides durante un año.
dialogues.they_en: I've been using opioids for a year.
dialogues.you_es: Necesitamos discutir un plan de manejo.
dialogues.you_en: We need to discuss a management plan.

dialogues.they_es: ¿Me puede dar una referencia al especialista?
dialogues.they_en: Can you give me a referral to a specialist?
dialogues.you_es: Sí, voy a ordenar esa referencia hoy.
dialogues.you_en: Yes, I'll order that referral today.
